violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. A metal pan was stored in the handwashing sink near the grill.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. The back door is sagging and the door is not being kept closed.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Potentially hazardous food maintained an internal temperature of 44 F.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. The back door is not capable of closing on its own.
